title: Game GOS Hidden actually not Nude Mana Pic
display_title: Game GOS Hidden actually not Nude Mana Pic
wikitext:
[]: [Game] GOS Hidden (actually not) Nude Mana Pic             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Aug 23, 2015 10:02 am I was decompressing the original GOS's game files to have a look at the backgrounds and the like when I discovered this beast of an image. Which brings me to the question, is this in the actual game or is it a hidden "easter egg" of sorts. I only played through it once and got the Kaji ending so I'm unsure if it is or not. Also, yowza! Hope this image isn't too lewd for Evageeks standards. Furthermore, I had to censor this image since her nipples were shown, FYI. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 23, 2015 10:35 am How odd - the copy I have is clothed. Mana, not nude -   SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:11 am pwhodges wrote: How odd - the copy I have is clothed. Mana, not nude -   SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:14 am Wow, I would not expect the staff to sneak something like this into the game files. Have never heard about this version of that scene. Thanks for letting us know.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:14 am ...I would like the uncensored version, please. I want this because reasons.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:19 am ^For science.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:25 am AR-99 wrote: Wow, I would not expect the staff to sneak something like this into the game files. Have never heard about this version of that scene. Thanks for letting us know.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:37 am Wow what a really odd find. No one found this before? And that bald Asuka is unsettling to say the least. Must be early stage of the game that they forgot to remove or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 23, 2015 11:55 am This isn't a new discovery; I've seen it before, probably on THAT BOARD, some time around a decade ago. The first obvious mention I could find is here. Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyhow, I thought it was interesting how with, um, ending 2 I guess it was, Mana flashes Shinji. (She took a shower at Misato's place.) Wonder if that means anything "happened"?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sun Aug 23, 2015 12:52 pm For what it's worth I've had this, from Gelbooru, for ages.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Aug 23, 2015 1:13 pm That's indeed nothing new. All those games had their CG sets ripped pretty much at release.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 23, 2015 1:26 pm It's not hidden, either; it's from one of the endings.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Aug 23, 2015 1:35 pm Yeah, I know it was on the net already. Did an image search and found it on a bunch of places (mostly in foreign languages) before I posted. But I wasn't sure if it was brought up here or not. Still, it's odd that the developers just left this in the game files. Sicarius VI wrote: And that bald Asuka is unsettling to say the least. Must be early stage of the game that they forgot to remove or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 23, 2015 10:28 pm Like blink and you'll miss it fast.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Aug 23, 2015 10:41 pm AR-99 wrote: Wow, I would not expect the staff to sneak something like this into the game files.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 24, 2015 1:55 am xPearse wrote: some clouds or sun glare

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Aug 24, 2015 9:12 am Mr. Tines wrote: That's an artifice of recent years in broadcast anime that is code for "Buy the Blu-rays".

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Aug 24, 2015 7:08 pm ^or if it's a bathing scene, steam. cyharding wrote: This is Gainax we're talking about. I'd be surprised if they didn't do something like this. (I'm actually half tempted to ask for an uncensored version myself. It straddles the line between tasteful and trashy)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 24, 2015 7:13 pm Jeez, a 2006 post...that takes me back! Rule of thumb with the Eva games: PC versions include nudity that the Playstation ports later censor (sun glare, etc)...I guess had Shinji Ikari Raising Project ever been Playstation/Nintendo-ported, some Shinji butt shots would have been covered up.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Three » Thu Aug 27, 2015 5:49 am This was always part of the game, pretty much part of the normal storyline. Once you played through it, it would be accessible through the main menu.
